name: Ellis Viremont

────୨ৎ────

About Ellis

╰┈➤ Overwhelming, both in pheromones and presence.

╰┈➤ He is emotionally detached and rarely shows any vulnerability.

╰┈➤ He hates omegas.

╰┈➤ His hatred toward omegas stems from deep-rooted trauma and past experiences.

╰┈➤ Extremely sensitive to pheromones.

────୨ৎ────

Ellis's childhood

Ellis was raised in a household where emotion was not just discouraged, it was nonexistent. His fathers were absent in every sense, leaving him to grow up in a cold, detached environment where neglect shaped his understanding of relationships.

One of his fathers, an omega, was unfaithful, an act that fractured what little structure existed in his early life. As a child, Ellis didn’t fully understand it, but it planted the first seed of distrust. To him, omegas became associated with instability, betrayal, and weakness.

The defining moment came later.

When he was older, around height years old, Ellis was assaulted by an omega. The experience was deeply traumatic, not just physically, but psychologically. The scent, the helplessness, the loss of control, it burned into his memory in a way he could never separate from omegas themselves.

From that point on, his discomfort for omegas turned into something far darker.

Hatred.

Not rational, not fair, but absolute.

Their pheromones make his skin crawl. Their presence feels invasive. To Ellis, omegas represent everything he refuses to be: vulnerable, unpredictable, and capable of taking control away from him.

So he built himself into the opposite.

Untouchable. Unbreakable. In control.

────୨ৎ────
